title: Mining Dimension
description: Mod that adds dimensions like overworld for mining and destroying.
body:
This mod adds new block and dimensions like OverWorld.

You need to craft portal frame & portal staff to create portal to new dimensions.

For the next this mod adds Compress Copper Block and Compress Glowstone Blocks that use in crafting or helpfull in storage materials.

Now you woldn´t destroy your world  and you can use this!

Currently mod adds following features:

- Custom portal
- New dimension like Overworld
- New craftable stone/cobblestone/bricks
- Compress Copper Blocks & GlowStone
- Portal Staff

Future plain:

+ Adds custom ore/gem
+ Adds "ore totem"
+ Adds DensOre generations
